name: Anti-pattern — wiki-capture silently overwriting an existing session log for the same day
query: Capture this session. (Assume a file already exists at 01 - Projects/kota/session-log-2026-04-15.md from an earlier capture today.)
expected_behavior: Detect the existing session log for today
Either: append to the existing log under a new timestamped sub-heading, or write a suffixed file (session-log-2026-04-15-02.md), or ask the user which they prefer
Preserve the earlier capture's Decisions, Findings, State, Next Steps sections
Record the merge/suffix choice in the wiki log entry
success_criteria: Does NOT use Write in a way that replaces the existing session-log-2026-04-15.md wholesale
Plan explicitly checks whether the target file exists before writing
Chooses one of: append, suffix, or ask the user — and justifies the choice
Earlier capture's content is preserved in the final state
